description: XChaCha20-Poly1305 album content encryption with 8-byte AAD ("MC" || version || reserved || epoch_id_LE).

serverBoundOutputs.name: ciphertext
serverBoundOutputs.reason: Album content ciphertext is uploaded to the server as opaque bytes.

serverBoundOutputs.name: nonce
serverBoundOutputs.reason: 24-byte XChaCha20 nonce is server-visible alongside ciphertext.

serverBoundOutputs.name: epochId
serverBoundOutputs.reason: Epoch identifier is needed to look up the correct content key.

forbiddenServerOutputs.name: plaintext
forbiddenServerOutputs.reason: Plaintext album content must never be uploaded.

forbiddenServerOutputs.name: contentKey
forbiddenServerOutputs.reason: Content key is derived from the epoch seed and never leaves the client.
